level_signals: 5–7+ years of experience in program management, operations, consulting, or related roles
Base pay CAD $120,000–$126,500 consistent with mid-senior IC level

must_haves.raw_text_from_jd: 5–7+ years of experience in program management, operations, consulting, or related roles
Demonstrate AI fluency using LLMs and/or automation platforms to streamline workflows and improve program efficiency
Excellent written and verbal communication skills, with experience keeping stakeholders informed and aligned
Ability to manage multiple priorities in a fast-paced environment
Ability to translate complex technical and operational problems into clear, actionable recommendations for diverse stakeholders
Strong decision-framing skills, including the ability to surface tradeoffs and guide teams toward alignment
Proven ability to build relationships, manage conflict, and influence cross-functional partners without direct authority
Track record of improving processes, solving problems, and building scalable systems that reduce friction
Strong program and project management toolkit, with ability to apply best practices based on program needs
Critical thinking skills, with ability to identify risks, dependencies, and opportunities across programs
Strong business acumen and ability to connect program execution to revenue, customer outcomes, and business goals
Experience leading through change and helping teams adopt new processes, tools, and ways of working

Utilizing AI tools, especially Claude and Gemini, and having a strong understanding on how to apply them to program management workflows, including synthesis, documentation, intake triage, stakeholder communications, and scalable process design.

nice_to_haves.raw_text_from_jd: Extensive AI experience with workflow automation, code and skills
Strong experience in Ads, commercial marketplaces, or tech platforms
Experience managing GTM launches or revenue-driving programs
Experience working with data, product, or operational systems
Familiarity with building process designs, documentation, or workflows

scope.surface: Commercial Program Management (CPM) team — cross-functional programs spanning Ads Product, Brand Partnerships, Eversight, Measurement Science, Retail, Strategic Partnerships, Finance, and Engineering
scope.business_model: B2B2C marketplace — grocery delivery, retail media / ads, brand partnerships
primary_metrics_inferred: Process efficiency and reduction of manual effort
core_responsibilities: Develop project plans and documentation, and support cross-functional workstreams
Flag risk identification, dependency tracking, issue identification, and change management
Utilize AI tools (Claude, Gemini) to design and scale program management workflows
Drive cross-functional program accountability on behalf of Brand Partnerships and commercial teams
Support automation development for knowledge management, issue tracking, and documentation
Assist in planning and executing go-to-market strategies for product launches and partnerships
Build frameworks, trackers, and operating rhythms to bring structure to ambiguity
Translate business goals into clear timelines, deliverables, and execution plans

compensation.equity_form: new hire equity grant and annual refresh grants

green_flags: Equity grants mentioned (new hire + annual refresh)
Flex First remote work policy — fully remote eligible
Clear team mission and well-scoped cross-functional partners listed
Explicit embrace of AI tooling as core to the role (not just a buzzword)
Role sits at intersection of strategy and execution — broad scope and learning opportunity
red_flags: Role is remote but only hiring in four Canadian provinces (Ontario, Alberta, British Columbia, Nova Scotia) — significantly limits eligible candidate pool
Compensation stated in CAD only; no USD equivalent provided, suggesting this is a Canada-only role despite '#LI-Remote' tag
Heavy emphasis on AI tools (Claude, Gemini) as core requirements may disadvantage experienced PMs who haven't yet adopted these specific tools
5–7+ years listed as minimum (the '+' is ambiguous about upper bound expectations)

fields_inferred_not_stated: seniority.level (inferred from title 'Program Manager II', years range, and CAD comp)
scope.business_model (inferred from product description — marketplace, ads, brand partnerships)
scope.primary_metrics_inferred (inferred from responsibilities; not explicitly listed in JD)
location.remote_us_eligible set to false (inferred from CAD-only comp and Canada-only hiring provinces stated in JD body)
compensation.base_range_usd set to null (only CAD range stated: $120,000–$126,500 CAD)
ambiguities: JD is tagged '#LI-Remote' and Instacart describes itself as 'Flex First' with flexibility to work from home, but the body explicitly states 'Currently, we are only hiring in the following provinces: Ontario, Alberta, British Columbia, and Nova Scotia' — suggesting this is a Canadian remote role only, not globally or US-remote eligible.
Years range '5–7+' is unusual — the '+' after 7 could imply a higher bar than the minimum of 5 suggests. Treated as minimum 5 years per stated lower bound.
work_auth and visa_sponsorship not addressed in the JD; left as 'unclear'.
